skills.name: Roost
skills.description: Set up a roost where the hawk can sit. When the hawk starts flying again, all Falconer skills except Roost have their cooldown times reset.
skills.effect_text:
Maximum Level: 1
Roost Duration: 5 seconds
Resets the cooldown of all Falconer skills except Roost

skills.name: Circling
skills.description: Increases party member and your AoE Attack Ratio. Your hawk reveals hidden enemies after 5 seconds of casting. Consumes SP continually and buff is removed when SP is exhausted.
skills.effect_text:
AoE Attack Ratio: + CaptionRatio
Consumes 30 SP every 5 seconds
45 seconds cooldown when removed
Max. level 5

skills.name: Pheasant
skills.description: Throw a training doll and have your hawk attack the targeted area. Attacked enemies become momentarily stunned. Deals additional damage to Beast-type enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5 times
Targets: CaptionRatio2
+50% damage to Beast-type enemies
[Stun] Chance: 50%
[Stun] Duration: 3 seconds

skills.name: Hanging Shot
skills.description: Move while hanging on your hawk. Prevents damage from close ranged attacks and you can damage enemies with basic attacks while hanging.

skills.name: Sonic Strike
skills.description: Command your hawk to divebomb enemies multiple times in the targeted area. The target is likely to be afflicted with [Blind]. Deals additional damage to Beast-type enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
[Blind] Debuff Chances: 50%
[Blind] Debuff Duration: 7 seconds
+50% damage to Beast enemies

skills.name: Aiming
skills.description: Enemies you target in an area around your hawk can be attacked from outside normal range. This range increases with the skill level. Only the caster receives the effect.

skills.name: Pre-Emptive Strike
skills.description: The hawk automatically attacks enemies near its master with Pheasant or Sonic Strike. Pre-Emptive Strike deals less damage than regular Sonic Strike, but the same debuff applies. Continuously consumes SP, and the effect cancels if low on SP.
skills.effect_text:
Consumes CaptionRatio SP per 5 seconds
Deals 25% of Sonic Strike or Pheasant's damage (must be previously learned)
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Tomahawk
skills.description: The hawk causes a great explosion in places where they glided, giving AoE damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Companion Mastery: Tenacity
attributes.description: * Increases stamina consumption cycle of companion by 10 seconds per attribute level

attributes.name: Companion First Aid
attributes.description:
* When companion HP is below 50%, activates [First Aid] effect to recover HP for 2 seconds

Duration is increased by 1 second per attribute level from Lv. 2

[First Aid] cannot be used for another 10 minutes after being activated

attributes.name: Pheasant: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Pheasant] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Sonic Strike: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Sonic Strike] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Sonic Strike: Confusion
attributes.description:
* Attacking enemies blinded as a result of [Sonic Strike] applies the [Confusion] debuff

* Confused enemies have their physical defense reduced and physical attack increased by attribute level x 0.5%

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Circling: Expand
attributes.description:
* Increases the AoE attack ratio by 3 when using [Circling]

* Increases SP consumption by 100%

attributes.name: Train: Flying Companion
attributes.description: * Increases the attack of [Tomahawk], [Sonic Strike] and [Pheasant] by 0.25% of your companion's attack per attribute level

attributes.name: Falconer: Hawk Eye
attributes.description: * Applies 3% of additional minimal critical chance per attribute level to all Falconer skills (not including basic attacks)

attributes.name: Tomahawk: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Tomahawk] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hanging Shot: Dodge
attributes.description:
* When using [Hanging Shot], your hawk will rescue you from an emergency, providing you temporary invincibility and decreasing damage taken by 30% for 5 seconds after [Hanging Shot] ends

* Hanging Shot Duration: 3 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Pheasant: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Pheasant] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Sonic Strike: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Sonic Strike] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Tomahawk: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Tomahawk] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Tomahawk: Scorched
attributes.description: * Instead of the original function, the Hawk descends toward the front of the character and leaves flames for 5 seconds. Applies damage to the enemy on the flame by 11% of Tomahawk for every 0.5 seconds
